content: The most persistent cross-reference issue (CR-004/CR-005) stemmed from a dissolved agent ('plot-architect') whose responsibilities were split across multiple specialists during roster planning, but whose name lingered in 2 architecture.json reader arrays. This 'ghost agent' pattern — where agent dissolution leaves orphaned references in non-prompt artifacts — is a systematic risk when agents are split or merged during planning.
sourceEvidence: iteration 3 gapsAddressed: ['CR-004', 'CR-005']. summary: 'Removed dissolved agent plot-architect from 2 reader arrays in architecture.json (foreshadowing-ledger.json, mystery-box-inventory.json)'.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
